calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender, and issuance of new birth certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235.

Petitioner Whitney Rae Bailey was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of Name and GENDER were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Miller Ray Bailey and Change of Gender from Female to Male.
Order Changing Name and Gender, and issuance of new birth certificate was submitted to and signed by the Court.
